changes: CHG-001 + CHG-002: Replaced 'block self-stretch' with 'flex items-center self-stretch' in both the ImageDropUploader className (no-logo state, line 533) and the logo <a> className (logo present, line 544) — handled via replace_all since both strings were identical.
CHG-003: Replaced 'block self-stretch' with 'flex items-center self-stretch' in the logo <a> class attribute (line 76) to keep PHP in sync with TSX.

syncStatus.notes: Pre-existing structure difference warning at depth 1 is unrelated to this change.

fixesApplied.description: ImageDropUploader className updated from 'block self-stretch' to 'flex items-center self-stretch' so the logo placeholder is vertically centered.
Logo <a> className updated from 'block self-stretch' to 'flex items-center self-stretch' so the logo image is vertically centered within the full-height container.
PHP logo <a> class updated from 'block self-stretch' to 'flex items-center self-stretch' to keep frontend in sync with editor.
